title: A Challenge in the U.S.-Iran Talks: Both Sides Demand Victory
summary_full: Washington and Tehran would need to defend any potential deal as a win for their side. And each has a leader whose approach to talks is vexing mediators.
summary_public: Washington and Tehran would need to defend any potential deal as a win for their side. And each has a leader whose approach to talks is vexing mediators.
